operations.description: Check whether a name is available for use with a new Azure Cache for Redis cache.
operations.displayName: Check Azure Cache for Redis name availability
operations.name: Microsoft.Cache/checknameavailability/action

operations.description: Register the Microsoft.Cache resource provider with a subscription, enabling Azure Cache for Redis and Azure Managed Redis resources to be created.
operations.displayName: Register Azure Cache for Redis and Azure Managed Redis resource provider
operations.name: Microsoft.Cache/register/action

operations.description: Unregister the Microsoft.Cache resource provider from a subscription.
operations.displayName: Unregister Azure Cache for Redis and Azure Managed Redis resource provider
operations.name: Microsoft.Cache/unregister/action

operations.description: List the operations supported by the Microsoft.Cache resource provider.
operations.displayName: List Azure Cache for Redis and Azure Managed Redis operations
operations.name: Microsoft.Cache/operations/read

operations.description: Read the result of a long-running Azure Cache for Redis operation for which the 'Location' header was previously returned to the client.
operations.displayName: Read Azure Cache for Redis operation results
operations.name: Microsoft.Cache/locations/operationResults/read

resourceTypes.displayName: Azure Cache for Redis cache
resourceTypes.name: redis

operations.description: Create or modify the settings and configuration of an Azure Cache for Redis cache.
operations.displayName: Write Azure Cache for Redis cache
operations.name: Microsoft.Cache/redis/write

operations.description: Read the settings and configuration of an Azure Cache for Redis cache.
operations.displayName: Read Azure Cache for Redis cache
operations.name: Microsoft.Cache/redis/read

operations.description: Delete an Azure Cache for Redis cache.
operations.displayName: Delete Azure Cache for Redis cache
operations.name: Microsoft.Cache/redis/delete

operations.description: List the access keys of an Azure Cache for Redis cache.
operations.displayName: List Azure Cache for Redis access keys
operations.name: Microsoft.Cache/redis/listKeys/action

operations.description: Regenerate the access keys of an Azure Cache for Redis cache.
operations.displayName: Regenerate Azure Cache for Redis access keys
operations.name: Microsoft.Cache/redis/regenerateKey/action

operations.description: Import data of a specified format from one or more storage blobs into an Azure Cache for Redis cache.
operations.displayName: Import data into Azure Cache for Redis
operations.name: Microsoft.Cache/redis/import/action

operations.description: Export data from an Azure Cache for Redis cache to prefixed storage blobs in the specified format.
operations.displayName: Export data from Azure Cache for Redis
operations.name: Microsoft.Cache/redis/export/action

operations.description: Force reboot an Azure Cache for Redis cache instance, potentially with data loss.
operations.displayName: Force reboot an Azure Cache for Redis cache instance, potentially with data loss.
operations.name: Microsoft.Cache/redis/forceReboot/action

operations.description: Stop an Azure Cache for Redis cache instance, potentially with data loss.
operations.displayName: Stop an Azure Cache for Redis cache instance, potentially with data loss.
operations.name: Microsoft.Cache/redis/stop/action

operations.description: Start a previously stopped Azure Cache for Redis cache instance.
operations.displayName: Start a previously stopped Azure Cache for Redis cache instance.
operations.name: Microsoft.Cache/redis/start/action

operations.description: Delete all keys in an Azure Cache for Redis cache.
operations.displayName: Flush Azure Cache for Redis cache
operations.name: Microsoft.Cache/redis/flush/action

operations.description: Read migration information for an Azure Cache for Redis cache. Internal API; do not use.
operations.displayName: Read Azure Cache for Redis migration information
operations.name: Microsoft.Cache/redis/getMigrationInfo/action

operations.description: Update the migration status of an Azure Cache for Redis cache. Internal API; do not use.
operations.displayName: Update Azure Cache for Redis migration status
operations.name: Microsoft.Cache/redis/updateMigrationStatus/action

operations.description: Update the DNS record of an Azure Cache for Redis cache during migration. Internal API; do not use.
operations.displayName: Update Azure Cache for Redis DNS for migration
operations.name: Microsoft.Cache/redis/updateDnsForMigration/action

operations.description: Roll back the DNS record of an Azure Cache for Redis cache during migration. Internal API; do not use.
operations.displayName: Roll back Azure Cache for Redis DNS for migration
operations.name: Microsoft.Cache/redis/rollbackDnsForMigration/action

operations.description: Auto-approve a private endpoint connection of an Azure Cache for Redis cache.
operations.displayName: Auto-approve a private endpoint connection of an Azure Cache for Redis cache.
operations.name: Microsoft.Cache/redis/PrivateEndpointConnectionsApproval/action

resourceTypes.displayName: The available metrics for an Azure Cache for Redis cache
resourceTypes.name: redis/metricDefinitions

operations.description: Read the available metric definitions for an Azure Cache for Redis cache.
operations.displayName: Read Azure Cache for Redis metric definitions
operations.name: Microsoft.Cache/redis/metricDefinitions/read

metricSpecifications.description: The number of client connections to the cache. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: connectedclients

metricSpecifications.description: The total number of commands processed by the cache server. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: totalcommandsprocessed

metricSpecifications.description: The number of successful key lookups. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: cachehits

metricSpecifications.description: The number of failed key lookups. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: cachemisses

metricSpecifications.description: The % of get requests that miss. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: cachemissrate

metricSpecifications.description: The number of get operations from the cache. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: getcommands

metricSpecifications.description: The number of set operations to the cache. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: setcommands

metricSpecifications.description: The number of instantaneous operations per second executed on the cache. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: operationsPerSecond

metricSpecifications.description: The number of items evicted from the cache. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: evictedkeys

metricSpecifications.description: The total number of items in the cache. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: totalkeys

metricSpecifications.description: The number of items expired from the cache. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: expiredkeys

metricSpecifications.description: The amount of cache memory used for key/value pairs in the cache in MB. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: usedmemory

metricSpecifications.description: The percentage of cache memory used for key/value pairs. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: usedmemorypercentage

metricSpecifications.description: The amount of cache memory used in MB, including fragmentation and metadata. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: usedmemoryRss

metricSpecifications.description: The percentage of cycles in which the Redis server is busy processing and not waiting idle for messages. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: serverLoad

metricSpecifications.description: The amount of data written to the cache in Megabytes per second (MB/s). For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: cacheWrite

metricSpecifications.description: The amount of data read from the cache in Megabytes per second (MB/s). For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/metrics.

metricSpecifications.description: Number of connections received by the shard; calculate the number of connections for a time period by comparing the value at different times. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/enterprise/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: ShardConnectionsReceivedTotal

metricSpecifications.description: Memory allocated by this shard's Redis process, as reported by the Redis allocator. On flash-enabled SKUs, this includes both DRAM and flash usage. May differ from OS-level memory due to allocator fragmentation. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/enterprise/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: ShardMemoryUsedBytes

metricSpecifications.description: Current memory used for input and output buffers of clients. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/enterprise/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: ShardMemoryClientsNormalBytes

metricSpecifications.description: Current memory used for input and output buffers of replication connections. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/enterprise/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: ShardMemoryClientsReplicaBytes

metricSpecifications.description: Total key count. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/enterprise/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: ShardKeyCount

metricSpecifications.description: Keys evicted on this shard. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/enterprise/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: ShardKeyEvictionsTotal

metricSpecifications.description: Keys expired on this shard. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/enterprise/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: ShardKeyExpirationsTotal

metricSpecifications.description: Number of read operations accessing an existing keyspace. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/enterprise/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: ShardKeyspaceReadHitsTotal

metricSpecifications.description: Number of read operations accessing a non-existing keyspace. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/enterprise/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: ShardKeyspaceReadMissesTotal

metricSpecifications.description: Number of write operations accessing an existing keyspace. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/enterprise/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: ShardKeyspaceWriteHitsTotal

metricSpecifications.description: Number of write operations accessing a non-existing keyspace. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/enterprise/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: ShardKeyspaceWriteMissesTotal

metricSpecifications.description: Number of bytes received by the shard; calculate the throughput for a time period by comparing the value at different times. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/enterprise/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: ShardNetworkInBytesTotal

metricSpecifications.description: Number of bytes sent by the shard; calculate the throughput for a time period by comparing the value at different times. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/enterprise/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: ShardNetworkOutBytesTotal

metricSpecifications.description: Indicates if the replica is connected to its primary. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/enterprise/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: ShardReplicationLinkHealthy

metricSpecifications.description: Number of string keys on this shard with a value size under 128 MB. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/enterprise/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: ShardStringsSizesUnder128M

metricSpecifications.description: Number of string keys on this shard with a value size between 128 MB and 512 MB. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/enterprise/metrics.
metricSpecifications.displayName: Shard Strings Sizes 128 MB to 512 MB (Preview)
metricSpecifications.name: ShardStringsSizes128MTo512M

metricSpecifications.description: Number of string keys on this shard with a value size exceeding 512 MB. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/enterprise/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: ShardStringsSizesOver512M

metricSpecifications.description: Number of set keys on this shard with fewer than 1 million elements. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/enterprise/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: ShardSetsItemsUnder1M

metricSpecifications.description: Number of set keys on this shard with between 1 million and 8 million elements. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/enterprise/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: ShardSetsItems1MTo8M

metricSpecifications.description: Number of set keys on this shard with more than 8 million elements. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/enterprise/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: ShardSetsItemsOver8M

metricSpecifications.description: Number of sorted set keys on this shard with fewer than 1 million elements. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/enterprise/metrics.
metricSpecifications.displayName: Shard Sorted Sets Items Under 1M Elements (Preview)
metricSpecifications.name: ShardZSetsItemsUnder1M

metricSpecifications.description: Number of sorted set keys on this shard with between 1 million and 8 million elements. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/enterprise/metrics.
metricSpecifications.displayName: Shard Sorted Sets Items 1M to 8M Elements (Preview)
metricSpecifications.name: ShardZSetsItems1MTo8M

metricSpecifications.description: Number of sorted set keys on this shard with more than 8 million elements. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/enterprise/metrics.
metricSpecifications.displayName: Shard Sorted Sets Items Over 8M Elements (Preview)
metricSpecifications.name: ShardZSetsItemsOver8M

metricSpecifications.description: Number of hash keys on this shard with fewer than 1 million fields. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/enterprise/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: ShardHashesItemsUnder1M

metricSpecifications.description: Number of hash keys on this shard with between 1 million and 8 million fields. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/enterprise/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: ShardHashesItems1MTo8M

metricSpecifications.description: Number of hash keys on this shard with more than 8 million fields. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/enterprise/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: ShardHashesItemsOver8M

metricSpecifications.description: Number of list keys on this shard with fewer than 1 million elements. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/enterprise/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: ShardListsItemsUnder1M

metricSpecifications.description: Number of list keys on this shard with between 1 million and 8 million elements. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/enterprise/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: ShardListsItems1MTo8M

metricSpecifications.description: Number of list keys on this shard with more than 8 million elements. For more details, see https://aka.ms/redis/enterprise/metrics.
metricSpecifications.name: ShardListsItemsOver8M
